question: What would make the /drum room more fun?
dek: Pick what you'd actually want. Share the link if you want your friends to weigh in — add ?via=yourname to the URL to tag your group.

options.label: A room to drum with a friend
options.hint: Multiplayer — see who else is tapping, hear the combined beat.

options.label: Drum along to songs
options.hint: Beat patterns fall down a track; tap the right drum on time.

options.label: Unlock more drum sounds
options.hint: Beyond low/mid/high — bells, shakers, toms, claps, new timbres.

options.label: A daily challenge / daily beat
options.hint: One new rhythm every day. Streak if you play every day.

options.label: Drum battles · head to head
options.hint: Two people, one beat, best copy wins.

options.label: Leaderboard + streaks
options.hint: Who's got the longest combo, the most taps this week.

outcomeAction: Leader graduates to a drum-rebuild direction in src/lib/sprints.ts within 24 hours of stabilizing; cron loop ships. Cohort tallies (via=?) let Mike filter by friend group — e.g. /api/poll?slug=drum-wishes&via=kana shows just that group's answers.
author: cc
source: cc-authored 2026-04-18 in response to Mike chat "how do you ask kana and her friends about what they'd like with drum". Seed poll for the cohort-tag invite pattern: share /poll/drum-wishes?via=kana in a group text, cc tallies per cohort.
